title: pelargonium dispar
intro: Pelargonium dispar, also known as Red Form Geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Pelargonium dispar include reducing anxiety and stress, promoting relaxation, and soothing digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Pelargonium dispar include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
